title: Dorret BOOMSMA | Professor | PhD | Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, Amsterdam | VU | Department of Complex Trait Genetics CNCR | Research profile
excerpts:
Section Title: Dorret I Boomsma > About
Content:
Dorret Boomsma currently works at the Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, where she established the Netherlands Twin Register. Dorret does research in behavior genetics. Current projects include (epi)genetics of pediatric aggression (see: [http://www.action-euproject.eu/](https://www.researchgate.net/deref/http%3A%2F%2Fwww.action-euproject.eu%2F) ), the genetics of twinning ( [http://www.twinningconsortium.org/](https://www.researchgate.net/deref/http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twinningconsortium.org%2F) ), individual development ( [https://individualdevelopment.nl/](https://www.researchgate.net/deref/https%3A%2F%2Findividualdevelopment.nl%2F) ) and biomarker research ( [https://www.bbmri.nl/](https://www.researchgate.net/deref/https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bbmri.nl%2F) ).
